name: genai/rate-limit
description: Fixed-window rate limiting. A RateLimiter over a pluggable store (file-backed by default), plus a RateLimitInterceptor that returns 429 when an IP exceeds the limit on a path (brute-force / flood protection). PHP 5.3-safe.

suggest.genai/web: RateLimitInterceptor (the Interceptor contract) — only loaded if you use it.
suggest.genai/http: The 429 Response returned by the interceptor.
